title: Buttons
writer: Marian Constance Blackton, George W. Hill, Ralph Spence
actors: Jackie Coogan, Lars Hanson, Gertrude Olmstead
plot: A young street orphan, Buttons, gets a job as a pageboy on an ocean liner. He and his friend, Slugger, get on the wrong side of the ship's captain, however, when they try to tell him his wife, who is aboard the ship, is cheating o...
